commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a GitHub Actions changes job and helper scripts so docs/Markdown-only changes can skip the macOS Swift test matrix while preserving portable lint and documentation-link checks.

Reproducibility: not applicable. as a bug reproduction; this is a CI cleanup PR. The after-change behavior is demonstrated by the linked fork Actions run that skips macOS tests for a docs-only proof PR and passes the aggregate gate.
commands.review_followup: - No automated repair is indicated; the remaining action is maintainer acceptance of the CI skip policy and normal merge gating after required checks complete.

target.title: ci: skip macOS shards for docs-only changes
target.body:
## Summary
- add a cheap `changes` job that classifies whether a PR/push can skip macOS Swift test shards
- skip `swift-test-macos` only for docs/Markdown-only changes
- allow the aggregate gate to pass when macOS shards are intentionally skipped

## Why
The current CI still requests four macOS runners for docs-only PRs. macOS queue time is the main remaining source of pending checks, so avoiding those shards for non-code changes reduces queue pressure without weakening validation for source, tests, scripts, workflow, or app localization changes.

## Safety
- Source, tests, scripts, workflow, package, and app localization changes still require macOS Swift tests.
- Empty or unavailable base diff falls back to running macOS tests.
- The aggregate job accepts only `success` or intentional `skipped` for the macOS matrix.

## Validation
- workflow YAML parsed with `yaml.safe_load`
- `bash -n Scripts/ci_macos_test_gate.sh`
- `git diff --check`
- docs/Markdown sample (`README.md`, `docs/index.html`, `docs/releasing-homebrew.md`) prints: `Skipping macOS Swift tests for docs/Markdown-only changes.`
- source sample (`Sources/CodexBar/MenuCardView.swift`) prints: `macOS Swift tests required for this change set.`
- app localization sample (`Sources/CodexBar/Resources/en.lproj/Localizable.strings`) prints: `macOS Swift tests required for this change set.`
- CI/scripts sample (`.github/workflows/ci.yml`, `Scripts/lint.sh`) prints: `macOS Swift tests required for this change set.`
- empty changed-path list conservatively prints: `macOS Swift tests required for this change set.`
- `GITHUB_OUTPUT` emits `macos-tests=false` for docs-only sample

## GitHub Actions proof
Docs-only proof PR: https://github.com/Yuxin-Qiao/CodexBar/pull/3

At run https://github.com/Yuxin-Qiao/CodexBar/actions/runs/27831467301:
- `changes`: success
- `swift-test-macos`: skipped
- `lint-build-test`: success
- `lint`: success

This proof PR targets the branch from this PR and changes only `docs/ci-path-gate-proof.md`, so it exercises the docs-only path that this PR is designed to optimize.

Relevant log excerpts:
- `changes` logged `Changed paths:` followed by `- docs/ci-path-gate-proof.md`
- `changes` logged `Skipping macOS Swift tests for docs/Markdown-only changes.`
- `lint-build-test` evaluated the macOS job result as `skipped`
- `lint-build-test` logged `Lint passed; macOS Swift tests skipped for docs/Markdown-only changes.`
target.author: yuxin-qiao

commands.reason: PR is not opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
